summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WILDWAVE landing page updates - Hero video implementation, Impressum and Datenschutz modals all working correctly with Swiss legal compliance
passed_tests: Hero section displays video instead of image with correct source URL
Video element has autoplay, loop, muted, and playsInline attributes configured correctly
Impressum link visible in footer with correct German text
Datenschutz link visible in footer with correct German text
Impressum modal opens successfully when clicking footer link
Impressum modal contains Swiss DSG compliance content (Art. 3 DSG)
Impressum modal displays correct company address (Im Isengrind 35, 8046 Zürich)
Impressum modal closes via X button click
Impressum modal closes via overlay click
Datenschutz modal opens successfully when clicking footer link
Datenschutz modal contains Swiss data protection law references (DSG)
Datenschutz modal displays comprehensive privacy policy content
Datenschutz modal closes via X button click
All existing navigation functionality still works (Services, About, Contact)
Hero call-to-action buttons are present and functional
Contact form remains accessible with all input fields
Cookie banner functionality continues to work properly
